name: Patient Intake Interview — Full Orchestrator (Create + Monitor)

parameters.content:
# Patient Intake Interview — Full Orchestrator

**Phase 1 (Top):** Appointment webhook → Craft purpose → Create Smart Form with referenceJson → Publish → Email patient
**Phase 2 (Bottom):** Session completed webhook → AI Agent pre-analysis via SmartForm Chat → Merge into mappedData → Save to Notion

Combines Create & Send (WF24) + Monitor & Save (WF25) into a single canvas.

## Phase 1 — Create & Send
Appointment system sends patient data + referenceJson.
Code node crafts department-specific purpose.
Smart Form created with schema mapping.
Patient receives email with interview link.

## Phase 2 — Monitor & Save
Webhook fires on session completion.
AI Agent analyzes clinical data + emotional state.
Enriched record saved to Notion for doctor review.

## Example Webhook Payload
```json
{
  "patient_name": "Emma Wilson",
  "patient_email": "emma@email.com",
  "department": "Cardiology",
  "doctor": "Dr. Mehmet Yilmaz",
  "appointment_time": "2026-03-24T14:30:00",
  "referenceJson": { "full_name": "string", "age": 0, ... }
}
```

## Patient Record Output
Enriched patient data (mapped fields + AI pre-analysis + emotional state) is sent as a JSON code block to the Slack #all-test channel for doctor review.

parameters.subject: =Prepare for your {{ $json.department }} appointment with {{ $json.doctor }}
parameters.html:
=

Your Upcoming Appointment

Dear {{ $json.patient_name }},

Your {{ $json.department }} appointment with {{ $json.doctor }} is scheduled for {{ $json.appointment_time }}.

Please complete this brief pre-visit interview so your doctor can better prepare for your visit.

Start Pre-Visit Interview

This interview takes approximately 5-10 minutes. Your responses are confidential and will only be shared with your care team.

City Medical Center

assignments.name: agentInput

options.systemMessage:
You are a medical AI pre-analysis assistant. You analyze patient intake data for doctors.

Tool:
- Formfex SmartForm: Chat — Discuss session data (max 500 chars per message)

Steps:
**Step 1 — Clinical Pre-Analysis:**
Use 'Formfex SmartForm: Chat': "Summarize key health concerns. Cross-reference symptoms with conditions."

**Step 2 — Emotional State:**
Use 'Formfex SmartForm: Chat': "Assess patient emotional state. Note anxiety, stress, tone."

**Step 3 — Return:**
{
  "pre_analysis": "[age][sex], [dept]. [complaint] x [duration], hx [conditions] on [meds]. [allergies]. Recommend: [tests]. Urgency: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
  "emotional_state": "Assessment of anxiety, stress, communication style, doctor approach recommendations"
}

IMPORTANT: Keep chat messages under 500 chars. Be clinically precise in pre_analysis, empathetic in emotional_state.
